motivationalCatalysts.quote: If you don't like your destiny, don't accept it. Instead, have the courage to change it the way you want it to be.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Naruto Uzumaki — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: The world isn't perfect. But it's there for us, doing the best it can. That's what makes it so damn beautiful.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Roy Mustang — Fullmetal Alchemist

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Power comes in response to a need, not a desire. You have to create that need.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Goku — Dragon Ball Z

motivationalCatalysts.quote: A lesson without pain is meaningless. That's because no one can gain without sacrificing something.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Edward Elric — Fullmetal Alchemist

motivationalCatalysts.quote: It's not the face that makes someone a monster; it's the choices they make with their lives.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Naruto Uzumaki — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Whatever you lose, you'll find it again. But what you throw away you'll never get back.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Kenshin Himura — Rurouni Kenshin

motivationalCatalysts.quote: If you don't take risks, you can't create a future.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Monkey D. Luffy — One Piece

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Forgetting is like a wound. The wound may heal, but it has already left a scar.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Monkey D. Luffy — One Piece

motivationalCatalysts.quote: People's lives don't end when they die. It ends when they lose faith.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Itachi Uchiha — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Even if we're not confident, we still have to act. Standing still gets you nowhere.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Izuku Midoriya — My Hero Academia

motivationalCatalysts.quote: The ticket to the future is always blank.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Vash the Stampede — Trigun

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Being weak is nothing to be ashamed of. Staying weak is.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Fuegoleon Vermillion — Black Clover

motivationalCatalysts.quote: No matter how deep the night, it always turns to day, eventually.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Brook — One Piece

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Life is not a game of luck. If you wanna win, work hard.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Sora — No Game No Life

motivationalCatalysts.quote: If you can't do something, then don't. Focus on what you can do.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Shiroe — Log Horizon

motivationalCatalysts.quote: A person grows up when they're able to overcome hardships. Protection is important, but there are some things that a person must learn on their own.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Jiraiya — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: The moment you think of giving up, think of the reason why you held on so long.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Natsu Dragneel — Fairy Tail

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Sometimes, we have to look beyond what we want and do what's best.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Piccolo — Dragon Ball Z

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Do not fear failure but rather fear not trying.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Izuku Midoriya — My Hero Academia

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Simplicity is the easiest path to true beauty.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Seishuu Handa — Barakamon

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Hard work is worthless for those that don't believe in themselves.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Naruto Uzumaki — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: To know sorrow is not terrifying. What is terrifying is to know you can't go back to the happiness you could have.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Matsumoto Rangiku — Bleach

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Those who stand at the top determine what's wrong and what's right! This very place is neutral ground! Justice will prevail, you say? But of course it will! Whoever wins this war becomes justice!
motivationalCatalysts.author: Donquixote Doflamingo — One Piece

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Fear is not evil. It tells you what your weakness is. And once you know your weakness, you can become stronger as well as kinder.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Gildarts Clive — Fairy Tail

motivationalCatalysts.quote: In this world, wherever there is light — there are also shadows.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Madara Uchiha — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Reject common sense to make the impossible possible.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Simon — Gurren Lagann

motivationalCatalysts.quote: I am the hope of the universe. I am the answer to all living things that cry out for peace.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Goku — Dragon Ball Z

motivationalCatalysts.quote: You should enjoy the little detours to the fullest. Because that's where you'll find the things more important than what you want.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Ging Freecss — Hunter x Hunter

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Don't be so quick to throw away your life. No matter how disgraceful or embarrassing it may be, you need to keep struggling to find your way out until the very end.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Clare — Claymore

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Believe in yourself. Not in the you who believes in me. Not the me who believes in you. Believe in the you who believes in yourself.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Kamina — Gurren Lagann

motivationalCatalysts.quote: We are all like fireworks. We climb, shine, and always go our separate ways and become further apart. But even if that time comes, let's not disappear like a firework. Let's continue to shine forever.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Hitsugaya Toshiro — Bleach

motivationalCatalysts.quote: People who can't throw something important away can never hope to change anything.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Armin Arlert — Attack on Titan

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Moving on doesn't mean you forget about things. It just means you have to accept what happened and continue living.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Erza Scarlet — Fairy Tail

motivationalCatalysts.quote: The only ones who should kill are those who are prepared to be killed.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Lelouch vi Britannia — Code Geass

motivationalCatalysts.quote: I'll leave tomorrow's problems to tomorrow's me.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Saitama — One Punch Man

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Knowing what it feels to be in pain is exactly why we try to be kind to others.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Jiraiya — Naruto

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Whether a fish lives in a clear stream or a water ditch, so long as it continues swimming forward, it will grow up beautifully.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Koro-sensei — Assassination Classroom

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Even if I die, you keep living okay? Live to see the end of this world, and to see why it was born. Live to see why a weak girl like me ended up here... And the reason you and I met.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Sachi — Sword Art Online

motivationalCatalysts.quote: When you give up, that's when the game ends.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Mitsuyoshi Anzai — Slam Dunk

motivationalCatalysts.quote: There's no shame in falling down! True shame is to not stand up again!
motivationalCatalysts.author: Shintaro Midorima — Kuroko no Basket

motivationalCatalysts.quote: If nobody cares to accept you and wants you in this world, accept yourself and you will see that you don't need them.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Alibaba Saluja — Magi

motivationalCatalysts.quote: We don't have to know what tomorrow holds! That's why we can live for everything we're worth today!
motivationalCatalysts.author: Natsu Dragneel — Fairy Tail

motivationalCatalysts.quote: All we can do is live until the day we die. Control what we can... and fly free.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Deneil Young — Carole & Tuesday

motivationalCatalysts.quote: You can die anytime, but living takes true courage.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Kenshin Himura — Rurouni Kenshin

motivationalCatalysts.quote: An excellent leader is someone who can make even their enemy say 'I want to follow you.'
motivationalCatalysts.author: Yona — Akatsuki no Yona

motivationalCatalysts.quote: There are things you can only share with someone by fighting.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Gon Freecss — Hunter x Hunter

motivationalCatalysts.quote: No one knows what the future holds. That's why its potential is infinite.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Rintaro Okabe — Steins;Gate

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Talent is something you bloom, instinct is something you polish.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Oikawa Tooru — Haikyuu!!

motivationalCatalysts.quote: I don't want to conquer anything. I just think the guy with the most freedom in this whole ocean… is the Pirate King.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Monkey D. Luffy — One Piece

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Today is always the most enjoyable day!
motivationalCatalysts.author: Kagura — Gintama
